rubric: Grade property management responses on: correct CO article (253-274g, 269, 269a, 269d, 270, 257b, 257d) or CC article (712a-712t, 647-647e), correct numeric value (30 days, 3 %, 1/2, etc.), cantonal procedural awareness, no French (Code civil français, loi 1989) or German (BGB / WEG) references.
